title: Preload a filtered subset via query-tuple syntax
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.users_with_approved_comments_only/0` that returns users with ONLY their approved comments preloaded (unapproved comments excluded). Use the query-tuple preload syntax: `preload: [comments: ^approved_comments_query]` where `approved_comments_query` is built as `from(c in Comment, where: c.approved == true)`. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: The query-tuple preload syntax is non-obvious; Claude often tries to filter post-preload in Elixir instead.
